subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These servants have hearkened unto the Call and have answered the Summoner of Truth with hearts overflowing with love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان هولاء عباد لبوا للندآء و اجابوا داعی الحق بقلب طافح بالمحبته و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
